case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. VIRGINIA WOODS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, VIRGINIA

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, VIRGINIA

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, VIRGINIA
